fields.title: Finish Effect cleanup in tau persistence, sandbox, and parser boundaries
fields.description: Follow up on tau-9sx. Remaining debt after removing the fake services/bootstrap wrappers: persistence and sandbox still use makeLegacyStateBridge/Effect.runFork patterns, agent/parser.ts still throws via decodeOrThrow, agent/worker.ts still uses unmanaged Effect.runFork status updates, and some tool-local boundary handlers still call Effect.runPromise directly. Goal: move the remaining boundaries to typed/service-owned Effect execution without reintroducing fake service shells.
fields.close_reason: persistence/sandbox Effect.runFork→runSync done (tau-ne4). worker.ts publishStatus Effect.runFork→runSync done. parser.ts decodeOrThrow already fixed. Effect.runPromise calls at pi API boundaries are legitimate.
